steps.title: Set each factor to zero
steps.content:
A product equals $0$ when at least one factor equals $0$. For
$$5x(x-6)(x+7)=0$$
the factors give $x=0$, $x=6$, or $x=-7$.

steps.title: Choose a listed solution
steps.content: Among the answer choices, $0$ is one of the solutions to the equation. The answer is B.
